text:
Detection: No security vendors flagged this file as malicious
File: skill.zip  Size  41.24 KB
Last analysis: 2026-02-19 22:11 UTC
Code insights: Type: OpenClaw Skill
Name: george
Version: 1.5.2

The OpenClaw skill 'george' is a banking automation tool for Erste Bank/Sparkasse Austria. It uses Playwright for browser automation and direct API calls. The code demonstrates strong security practices, including robust input sanitization (`_sanitize_id`), path traversal prevention (`_validate_upload_file`, `_safe_download_filename`), and strict permission hardening for sensitive session data (`_set_strict_umask`, `_harden_tree`) in `scripts/george.py`. All network communication is directed to legitimate banking domains (`api.sparkasse.at`, `george.sparkasse.at`). There is no evidence of intentional harmful behavior, data exfiltration to unauthorized endpoints, or malicious prompt injection in `SKILL.md`.
